fields.calculatedFormula: IF( ( AnnualRevenue >20000000),"High Priority", IF(AND( AnnualRevenue < 20000000, AnnualRevenue > 10000000),"Medium Priority", "Low Priority"))

fields.calculatedFormula:
IF( AnnualRevenue <= 3000000, "SMB",
IF( AND( AnnualRevenue > 3000000, AnnualRevenue <= 5000000), "Commercial",
IF( AnnualRevenue > 5000000, "Enterprise", "SMB")))
fields.label: Segment (Auto-Calc)
